products.title: PulseFit Wireless Sport Headphones
products.description: Sweat-resistant gym headphones with secure fit.

products.title: AeroBeat ANC Headphones
products.description: Over-ear ANC for commute and office use.

products.title: StrideMax Comfort Running Shoes
products.description: Cushioned running shoes for long sessions.

amz-headphones-100.description: IPX5 sweat resistance, 10-hour battery, secure ear hooks.

amz-shoes-200.description: Breathable knit upper and responsive foam midsole.

amz-headphones-100.title: Great fit for workouts
amz-headphones-100.body: Stays put during lifting and cardio. Good value.

amz-headphones-100.title: Battery is average
amz-headphones-100.body: Solid sound, but I wish battery lasted longer.

amz-headphones-101.title: Excellent noise cancelling
amz-headphones-101.body: Perfect for flights and office focus.

amz-headphones-101.title: Bulky for gym
amz-headphones-101.body: Sound quality is great but too warm for workouts.

amz-shoes-200.title: Comfort first
amz-shoes-200.body: Very comfortable underfoot, especially on treadmill.

amz-shoes-200.title: Durability concern
amz-shoes-200.body: Outsole wore down in about 4 months.
